normalization.notes: Store Linear B syllabograms and ideograms in NFC with transliteration and tablet context preserved. Do not normalize signs to Greek alphabet text or silently fill unwritten consonants.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: syllabograms, selected ideograms, transliteration syllables, administrative word chunks, tablet context labels, and damaged-text notes
segmentation.notes: Linear B is a syllabary with separate ideograms used heavily in administrative tablets. Runtime data should distinguish script signs, transliteration, Mycenaean word interpretation, and cautious pronunciation.
